text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the spring Tenno Sho, one of Gold
Ship's big landmark races for the year, and she is
acting as strange as ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oh-hohoho! Refined laughter echoes throughout
the paddock. By learning the ways of etiquette,
Gold Ship has transformed into the noblest of
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Eishin Flash blocks her path. For the
sake of victory and a clue, Gold Ship must
elegantly dance―nay, race her way to the goal!
